channel.title: Bookmarks on Revgen
channel.description: Recent content in Bookmarks on Revgen

item.title: Bookmarks
item.description: a.cell { float: left; text-decoration: none; padding: 9px 14px 9px 14px; margin: 9px 4px 9px 4px; font-size: 18px; color: #ffffff; border: 2px solid #bbbbbb; /* margin: 5px; border-radius: 25px; border: 1px solid $text-color; padding: 10px;*/ width: 106px; height: 106px; text-align: center; font-size: 90%; } a.cell img { width: 94px; height: 94px; border: none; -webkit-filter: none; filter: none; } a.cell p { padding: 0; margin: 0; text-align: center; } div.cell-groups { clear: both; } h2 { font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; padding: 9px 14px 9px 14px; margin: 9px 4px 9px 4px; color: #ffffff; border: 2px solid #bbbbbb; } br { display: none; } Google
